items.line: Scouting reusable public school-tied sources while keeping prototypes isolated from the live pipeline.
Tightening the Beehiiv-first publishing loop, native LinkedIn funnel, and classroom edition workflow.
Hardening the synced Brain into a reliable research, librarian, and briefing layer for daily work.
Converging the work board and agent status view into one pane for todos, routing, and visibility.
